name: Lakeshore Acquisition III Corp.
summary: Lakeshore Acquisition III Corp. is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on October 21, 2024, formed to execute an initial business combination via merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar transaction. It completed an IPO on May 1, 2025, raising $69,000,000 from 6,900,000 units at $10.00 each. The company targets businesses in North America, South America, Europe, or Asia, with no specific industry focus. It generates no operating revenue until a business combination is completed.
